name: Air Traffic & Airport Technical Services
student_summary: Guide aircraft safely — ATC and airport technical operations.
overview: Guide aircraft safely — ATC and airport technical operations. Air Traffic & Airport Technical Services sits in the Sea & Air family of Transportation, Logistics & Supply Chain. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.

You want a laptop-anywhere lifestyle — this work happens in person

faqs: What does Air Traffic & Airport Technical Services pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹8 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹15 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Physics, Mathematics. Typical degrees: B.Sc/B.Tech + AAI ATC exam. Alternatives exist: operations floor → manager ladder.
Will AI take over this career?

AI impact is minimal — deeply human/physical work. Broad paths like Air Traffic & Airport Technical Services evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Air Traffic & Airport Technical Services is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
